defs: Form, as depending on the relative disposition of the parts of a thing; shape; figure.
quotes: It is the variety of configurations [of the mouth] . . . which gives birth and origin to the several vowels.

defs: Relative position or aspect of the planets; the face of the horoscope, according to the relative positions of the planets at any time.
quotes: They [astrologers] undertook . . . to determine the course of a man's character and life from the configuration of the stars at the moment of his birth.
